requirement_topic.en: Sea transport — UN 38.3 and IMDG dangerous-goods classification

summary.en: All lithium-ion battery modules shipped by sea into Jamaica must comply with UN 38.3 transport testing and with IMDG documentation requirements. Sea shipments to Jamaica require complete declarations, dangerous-goods data sheets, and correct class labeling for loading and storage control.
summary.zh: 所有海运进入牙买加的锂离子电池模组必须符合UN 38.3运输测试并满足IMDG文件要求。运往牙买加海运货物需提交完整申报、危险货物安全数据表及正确类别标识，以便装卸和仓储控制。
summary.zht: 所有海運進入牙買加的鋰離子電池模組必須符合UN 38.3運輸測試並滿足IMDG文件要求。運往牙買加海運貨物需提交完整申報、危險貨物安全數據表及正確類別標識，以便裝卸和倉儲控制。

standards_or_laws: UN 38.3 (Recommendations on the Transport of Dangerous Goods — Tests and Criteria, Rev.7, 2019 + Amend. 1)
IMDG Code 2022 (International Maritime Dangerous Goods Code, Amendment 41-22)
SOLAS 1974 as amended (Chapter VII — Carriage of Dangerous Goods)

summary.en: China applies UN-based testing and transport paperwork controls for export lithium batteries through customs and dangerous-goods channels. Accredited Chinese laboratories commonly issue valid UN 38.3 reports. The core technical standard is the same globally; the practical issue is whether shipping scope and paperwork match Jamaican import handling expectations.
summary.zh: 中国在出口锂电池时也按UN体系进行检测与危险品报关管理，认可实验室常可出具UN 38.3报告，技术标准在全球上是一致的。现实差异主要在于货运范围定义和文件是否满足牙买加进口环节处理预期。
summary.zht: 中國在出口鋰電池時也按UN體系進行檢測與危險品報關管理，認可實驗室常可出具UN 38.3報告，技術標準在全球上是一致的。現實差異主要在於貨運範圍定義和文件是否滿足牙買加進口環節處理預期。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 28164-2011 (Secondary lithium cells and batteries — transport tests)

gap.en: UN 38.3 itself is globally valid. The Jamaica-facing gap is practical: (1) scope must match the exact cell model and shipping configuration, (2) dangerous-goods documentation must include complete shipping and local handling instructions for Kingston port operations, and (3) SOC limits and packing declarations must be explicitly stated for maritime carriage.
gap.zh: UN 38.3标准本身全球通用。牙买加相关差距体现在执行层面：（1）报告范围需覆盖实际电芯型号及出运配置；（2）危险品文件需补充牙买加金斯顿港作业和处理要求的完整装卸说明；（3）海运应明确SOC限制及装箱申报要求。
gap.zht: UN 38.3標準本身全球通用。牙買加相關差距體現在執行層面：（1）報告範圍需覆蓋實際電芯型號及出運配置；（2）危險品文件需補充牙買加金斯頓港作業和處理要求的完整裝卸說明；（3）海運應明確SOC限制及裝箱申報要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — international and Jamaica import transport requirement for all sea freight
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for Chinese export as well; same standard

source.publisher: United Nations Economic Commission for Europe (UNECE) — Dangerous Goods

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] UN 38.3 reports from approved laboratories are valid. For Jamaica shipments, ensure the report and shipping papers are exactly scoped to the model shipped, and that all IMDG documents include sea-vessel handling notes, SOC limits, and Kingston port operator expectations.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 来自认可实验室的UN 38.3报告是有效的。向牙买加航运时应确保报告与装运文件覆盖具体出运型号，且IMDG文件完整包含海运作业说明、SOC限制及金斯顿港操作方的要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 來自認可實驗室的UN 38.3報告是有效的。向牙買加航運時應確保報告與裝運文件覆蓋具體出運型號，且IMDG文件完整包含海運作業說明、SOC限制及金斯頓港操作方的要求。

requirement_topic.en: Transport safety — IEC 62281 safety in transport

summary.en: Jamaica-linked projects that include BESS sea shipments commonly reference IEC 62281 as the product-level transport safety evidence, complementing UN 38.3. The standard clarifies electrical and mechanical failure modes relevant for marine handling and storage.
summary.zh: 牙买加相关项目的BESS海运通常会将IEC 62281作为UN 38.3的补充产品级运输安全证据，规定了海运搬运和储存中的电气及机械失效情形。
summary.zht: 牙買加相關項目的BESS海運通常會將IEC 62281作為UN 38.3的補充產品級運輸安全證據，規定了海運搬運和儲存中的電氣及機械失效情形。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62281:2019 (Safety of primary and secondary lithium cells and batteries during transport)

summary.en: Chinese exporters commonly hold UN 38.3 certificates under GB/T 28164 and related industrial battery documentation. IEC 62281 adds a product-level transport safety framing that is not always included in every domestic documentation set, especially for larger stationary battery assemblies.
summary.zh: 中国出口商通常持有基于GB/T 28164及其他工业电池文件的UN 38.3证书。IEC 62281提供了产品级运输安全框架，但并非每一套国内资料都完整覆盖，尤其是大型固定储能组装体。
summary.zht: 中國出口商通常持有基於GB/T 28164及其他工業電池文件的UN 38.3證書。IEC 62281提供了產品級運輸安全框架，但並非每一套國內資料都完整覆蓋，尤其是大型固定儲能組裝體。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 28164-2011 (Secondary lithium cells and batteries — portable applications — transport tests)

gap.en: Where Jamaica buyers or project teams request IEC-level transport scope, UN 38.3 alone may not be treated as complete without IEC 62281-aligned evidence for the shipped configuration and pack-level handling assumptions.
gap.zh: 当牙买加买方或项目团队要求IEC级别运输范围时，单有UN 38.3可能不足以代表完整符合性，需有与出运配置及组包处理假设一致的IEC 62281证据。
gap.zht: 當牙買加買方或項目團隊要求IEC級別運輸範圍時，僅有UN 38.3可能不足以代表完整符合性，需有與出運配置及組包處理假設一致的IEC 62281證據。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in many Jamaica utility-linked BESS logistics files
mandatory_status.cn: Domestic GB transport paths are common but not always IEC 62281-mapped

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] In Jamaica-facing BESS imports, treat IEC 62281 as an additional transport file requirement where requested by buyer, freight forwarder, or insurer. This usually does not replace UN 38.3 but closes a review gap on packaging, handling, and transport-level fault scenarios.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 对于牙买加BESS进口，若买方、货代或保险方要求，应将IEC 62281作为UN 38.3的补充运输文件。这通常不替代UN 38.3，但可弥补在包装、操作和运输故障场景方面的审查差距。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 對於牙買加BESS進口，若買方、貨代或保險方要求，應將IEC 62281作為UN 38.3的補充運輸文件。這通常不替代UN 38.3，但可彌補在包裝、操作和運輸故障場景方面的審查差距。

requirement_topic.en: Port of entry and customs — Kingston, Jamaica
requirement_topic.zh: 入境港口与海关——牙买加金斯顿港
requirement_topic.zht: 入境港口與海關——牙買加金斯頓港

summary.en: Kingston is the principal commercial entry point for BESS freight and imported heavy equipment. Customs clearance and dangerous-goods handling require advance coordination with local authorities and licensed freight handlers. Documentation is generally expected in English, with clear UN classification and consignee/importer declaration details.
summary.zh: 金斯顿是BESS货运和进口重型设备的主要商业入境口岸。海关清关和危险品处理需与当地主管机构和持牌货运方提前协调。文件通常要求英文提交，且需明确UN分类和收货人/进口商声明信息。
summary.zht: 金斯頓是BESS貨運和進口重型設備的主要商業入境港口。海關清關和危險品處理需與當地主管機關及持牌貨運方提前協調。文件通常要求英文提交，且需明確UN分類和收貨人/進口商聲明資訊。

standards_or_laws: IMDG Code 2022 (pre-arrival and dangerous-goods communication requirements)
Jamaica Port Authority dangerous-goods handling guidance

summary.en: China export compliance covers Chinese customs filing, terminal declarations, and dangerous-goods checks prior to departure. Those processes are not sufficient for Jamaica import execution unless documentation is re-oriented to Jamaican port and customs operators.
summary.zh: 中国出口合规覆盖中国口岸申报、报关和出境危险品检查，但若未按牙买加进口执行端重组文件，这些资料不足以支持牙买加的入境清关流程。
summary.zht: 中國出口合規覆蓋中國口岸申報、報關和出境危險品檢查，但若未按牙買加進口執行端重組文件，這些資料不足以支持牙買加的入境清關流程。

standards_or_laws: GACC — China customs export declaration requirements

gap.en: Logistics must be planned specifically for Kingston throughput windows, container stack and dwell-time patterns, and importer-side customs sequencing. Missing pre-arrival data or incomplete consignee import declarations can delay release into Jamaica.
gap.zh: 物流须按牙买加金斯顿港吞吐节奏、集装箱堆位和滞留周期、进口方清关顺序进行规划。缺少提前预报数据或进口申报信息不全会导致放行延误。
gap.zht: 物流須按牙買加金斯頓港吞吐節奏、集裝箱堆位和滯留周期、進口方清關順序進行規劃。缺少提前預報數據或進口申報資訊不全會導致放行延誤。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — destination customs and port clearance prerequisite
mandatory_status.cn: N/A for China departure; documentation and handling remain export-dependent before shipment

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Plan Jamaica imports through Kingston with an experienced freight broker familiar with Jamaican customs and port operations. Ensure full English shipping packets, pre-notification, and dangerous-goods labels are included before vessel arrival.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在金斯顿口岸运输牙买加进口项目时，应使用熟悉牙买加海关和港口操作的经验丰富货代。必须在船舶到达前提交完整英文运输文件、提前申报和危险品标签。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在金斯頓港口運輸牙買加進口項目時，應使用熟悉牙買加海關和港口作業的經驗豐富貨代。必須在船舶到達前提交完整英文運輸文件、提前申報和危險品標籤。
